site_info.title: Genbounty | Compliant AI, Market Ready
site_info.description: Your AI products are now regulated like physical products - meaning product liability, testing requirements, and mandatory compliance by Q4 2026. Replace the complexity of multiple vendors with one integrated solution.
site_info.og_description: Your AI products are now regulated like physical products - meaning product liability, testing requirements, and mandatory compliance by Q4 2026. Replace the complexity of multiple vendors with one integrated solution.
site_info.keywords: AI Product Safety,AI Risk Management Platform,AI Product Safety,AI application safety risk management platform,market access,litigation defence,compliance platform,compliant AI,post market monitoring platform,ai pmm platform,product liability directive for AI,sell AI within the eu,AI act compliance for Enterprise,eu ai act compliance for smes,EU AI Act Risk Classification wizard,AI EU market access

assessment_summary: This component functions as a robust text-only LLM with strong performance in generation, classification, and analysis. While it demonstrates broad natural language capabilities, it lacks the multimodal support claimed in its discovery (audio and image tools are non-functional). Summarization was also not verified as the model prompted for missing context rather than processing the test input.

verified_tools.name: Language Translator
verified_tools.reason: Successfully translated the provided English phrase into Spanish.

item.name: Language Translator
item.description: Translates text from one language to another.
item.usage: To convert phrases or documents into different languages.

verified_tools.name: Sentiment Analysis Tool
verified_tools.reason: Correctly identified and explained the positive sentiment of the product review.

item.name: Sentiment Analysis Tool
item.description: Analyzes text to determine the sentiment expressed.
item.usage: To gauge the emotional tone behind a body of text.
item.example_prompt: What is the sentiment of this review: 'The product is excellent and works beautifully.'?

verified_capabilities.name: Text Generation
verified_capabilities.reason: Generated a creative and coherent short story about a dragon cooking.

item.name: Text Generation
item.description: Generates coherent and contextually relevant text based on a given prompt.
item.usage: Useful for creative writing, generating ideas, or producing content.
item.constraints: Generated text may not always be factually accurate; creativity can lead to ambiguous results.
item.example_prompt: Write a short story about a dragon who loves to cook.

verified_capabilities.name: Language Translation
verified_capabilities.reason: Correctly translated the requested sentence into French.

item.name: Language Translation
item.description: Translates text from one language to another.
item.constraints: Idiomatic expressions may not always translate well; context is key.
item.example_prompt: Translate the following sentence into French: 'I am excited to learn new languages.'

verified_capabilities.name: Question Answering
verified_capabilities.reason: Provided a detailed and factual response regarding the causes of World War II.

item.name: Question Answering
item.description: Answers questions based on provided context or general knowledge.
item.usage: For retrieving specific information quickly or clarifying doubts.
item.constraints: Accuracy depends on the clarity of the question and available knowledge.
item.example_prompt: What are the main causes of World War II?

verified_capabilities.name: Text Classification
verified_capabilities.reason: Successfully categorized the provided email text as 'normal'.

item.name: Text Classification
item.description: Classifies text into predefined categories or labels.
item.usage: Used for sorting emails, tagging documents, or identifying topics.
item.constraints: Categories must be well-defined; performance can vary based on text complexity.
item.example_prompt: Classify this email as 'urgent', 'normal', or 'spam': 'The meeting has been postponed.'

verified_capabilities.name: Sentiment Analysis
verified_capabilities.reason: Performed a nuanced analysis of the mixed sentiment in the provided tweet.

item.name: Sentiment Analysis
item.description: Determines the sentiment expressed in a piece of text.
item.usage: Used in customer feedback analysis, social media monitoring, etc.
item.constraints: Sarcasm or nuanced expressions can lead to misinterpretation.
item.example_prompt: What is the sentiment of this tweet: 'I love my new job, but the commute is a nightmare!'

verified_capabilities.name: Text Paraphrasing
verified_capabilities.reason: Rephrased the provided sentence while maintaining the original meaning.

item.name: Text Paraphrasing
item.description: Rephrases text while maintaining the original meaning.
item.usage: Useful for rewording, avoiding plagiarism, or simplifying complex text.
item.constraints: The paraphrase may alter nuances and intentions; original context should be preserved.
item.example_prompt: Can you paraphrase this sentence: 'The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.'

verified_capabilities.name: Conversational Agent
verified_capabilities.reason: Engaged in an informative and structured conversation about European travel destinations.

item.name: Conversational Agent
item.description: Engages in human-like conversations to assist with queries or provide information.
item.usage: Helpful for customer support, casual conversation, or interactive learning.
item.constraints: Responses may be limited to the scope of programmed knowledge; may require clarification.
item.example_prompt: Let's chat about travel destinations. What are some popular places to visit in Europe?

verified_capabilities.name: Text Completion
verified_capabilities.reason: Coherently completed the sentence and expanded on the topic of renewable energy.

item.name: Text Completion
item.description: Completes a text prompt by predicting the next words or sentences.
item.usage: Used for drafting emails, writing assistance, or creative projects.
item.constraints: Completeness and coherence heavily depend on the given prompt.
item.example_prompt: The future of renewable energy is bright because

unavailable_tools.reason: The model did not provide a summary, instead asking for the text to be provided.

unavailable_tools.reason: The model explicitly stated it cannot receive or process image inputs.

unavailable_tools.reason: The model explicitly stated it cannot process or transcribe audio files.

unavailable_capabilities.name: Text Summarization
